emails.subject: ENA Footnote for 12/31/00
emails.body: ENA Footnote for 12/31/00 Tana- I work in the Tax Department with Mark Ng and I was wondering if you had the information on which entities will be included in the ENA footnote as of 12/31/00. If you are not the right person to contact on this matter, I apologize for taking up your time. Please let me know the contact on this if possible. Thank you, Noveena ext. 5-8337
